Include only \u2014 search will return o: Include only — search will return only the selected post types
Exclude \u2014 remove the selected post: Exclude — remove the selected post types from results
Limit which post types this search exper: Limit which post types this search experience covers. Leave the list empty to search everything.
Leave empty to use the full container wi: Leave empty to use the full container width.
Pick which sections appear in the dropdo: Pick which sections appear in the dropdown.
No types selected \u2014 the dropdown wo: No types selected — the dropdown won’t appear until at least one is enabled.
Display an autocomplete dropdown as the: Display an autocomplete dropdown as the visitor types. Requires a configured Jetpack Search site ID.
Pixels before the bottom of the list at: Pixels before the bottom of the list at which the next page starts loading.
Automatically load more results as the v: Automatically load more results as the visitor scrolls toward the end of the list.
%1$s out of 5 stars based on %2$d review: %1$s out of 5 stars based on %2$d review
%1$s out of 5 stars based on %2$d reviews
Configured on the parent Search Results: Configured on the parent Search Results block — the block that frames this search experience owns its post-type scope.
Shown when a search request fails. Leave: Shown when a search request fails. Leave empty for the default.
Shown when active filters return zero re: Shown when active filters return zero results. Leave empty for the default.
Shown when a search returns nothing. Lea: Shown when a search returns nothing. Leave empty for the default.
Matches content: an older post with a br: Matches content: an older post with a brief excerpt showing the matched text.
Matches content: a second excerpt demons: Matches content: a second excerpt demonstrating how content highlights appear in results.
Matches content: this snippet shows the: Matches content: this snippet shows the relevant passage that matched your search query.
Heading shown above the options. Leave e: Heading shown above the options. Leave empty for the default.
Hide rows you don\u2019t want shoppers t: Hide rows you don’t want shoppers to pick. At least one row must stay visible.
Heading shown above the star rows. Leave: Heading shown above the star rows. Leave empty for the default.
Minimum must be less than maximum for th: Minimum must be less than maximum for the slider to render correctly.
When enabled, the slider bounds match th: When enabled, the slider bounds match the store’s actual minimum and maximum product price. Disable to set the range manually.
Leave blank to use the active WooCommerc: Leave blank to use the active WooCommerce currency.
Adds a draggable range slider above the: Adds a draggable range slider above the number inputs. Mirrors WooCommerce Blocks’ price slider.
Heading shown above the options. Leave e: Heading shown above the options. Leave empty to use the attribute's name.
No WooCommerce product attributes are re: No WooCommerce product attributes are registered on this site, so this block has nothing to filter on.
Pick a WooCommerce product attribute in: Pick a WooCommerce product attribute in the block sidebar to enable this filter.
No WooCommerce product attributes were f: No WooCommerce product attributes were found on this site.
Pick which WooCommerce product attribute: Pick which WooCommerce product attribute drives this filter.
Show posts that match any of the selecte: Show posts that match any of the selected options.
Show posts that match all selected optio: Show posts that match all selected options.
Pick which registered taxonomy this filt: Pick which registered taxonomy this filter targets. Only taxonomies that Jetpack Search indexes (natively or via a jetpack-search-tagN slot mapping) appear here; "(mapped)" flags a slot-routed entry.
Jetpack Search doesn't index any custom: Jetpack Search doesn't index any custom taxonomies on this site. Map one to a reserved jetpack-search-tagN slot via the jetpack_search_custom_taxonomy_map filter, or add it to Jetpack Search's allowlist, and it will appear here.
Reveal the button only once the shopper: Reveal the button only once the shopper selects a filter or price range.
Hide when no filter is active: Hide when no filter is active
Once a visitor searches, an AI-generated: Once a visitor searches, an AI-generated answer will appear here with citations drawn from your site.
After the brief answer arrives, offer a: After the brief answer arrives, offer a button that loads a longer, more detailed response.
Allow \"Show more\" for a longer answer: Allow "Show more" for a longer answer
Display the sources used by the AI under: Display the sources used by the AI under the answer.
Label shown above the answer. Leave empt: Label shown above the answer. Leave empty for the default.
AI Answer is part of the paid Jetpack Se: AI Answer is part of the paid Jetpack Search plan. Upgrade to enable AI-generated answers with citations on your search results.
No results match these filters. Try clea: No results match these filters. Try clearing some, or searching for something else.
Applied on first load when the URL carri: Applied on first load when the URL carries no sort parameter.
When enabled, queries fire on Enter or w: When enabled, queries fire on Enter or when clearing the field, instead of on every keystroke.
Leave empty to use the default translate: Leave empty to use the default translated placeholder.
Leave empty to use the default translated label.
Leave empty to use the default \"Date\": Leave empty to use the default "Date" label.
Bucket size: yearly suits long-running b: Bucket size: yearly suits long-running blogs; monthly suits archive-heavy news sites.
Choose a taxonomy in the block settings: Choose a taxonomy in the block settings to enable this filter. Until a taxonomy is set, this block renders nothing on the front end.
What this filter groups results by. Swit: What this filter groups results by. Switch without deleting the block.
Leave empty to use the variation's defau: Leave empty to use the variation's default label (e.g. Category, Tag).
A label is required so visitors see a he: A label is required so visitors see a heading above this filter.
